2.text: Enforcement No: 003/2011 THE JUDICIAL AUTHORITY OF THE DUBAI INTERNATIONAL FINANCIAL CENTRE IN THE COURT OF FIRST INSTANCE BETWEEN

3.text:
(1) HUSSAIN AI AWLAQI(2) ANDREW CLOUTJudgment Creditor
And KHURAM HUSSAINJudgment Debtor

4.text: INTERIM CHARGING ORDER UPON reading the application by the Judgment Creditor for an interim

5.text: charging order; and HAVING reviewed the Rules of the DIFC Courts; IT IS ORDERED THAT:

6.text: 1. A charge is imposed over the Judgment Debtor's interest in Tabarak Partners LLP (in liquidation), a DIFC registered Limited Liability Partnership.

7.text: 2. A hearing shall take place on 22 March 20011 at 10am to consider whether to make a fi nal charging order.

8.text: Issued by Mark Beer Registrar Date of Issue: 15 February 2011 At: 12pm
